hooks.command: bash -c 'BLOCKED=".env .env.local package-lock.json"; for f in $BLOCKED; do if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *"$f" ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: $f is protected." >&2; exit 1; fi; done'
bash -c 'if grep -nEi "(api_key|secret|password|token)\s*[:=]\s*[\x27\"][A-Za-z0-9]{8,}" "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Possible hardcoded secret." >&2; exit 1; fi'

bash -c '# HARNESS-LINT-HOOK-TS
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */frontend/src/*.js || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */frontend/src/*.jsx || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */frontend/src/*.ts || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */frontend/src/*.tsx ]]; then cd frontend && npx eslint "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | tail -20; elif [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */backend/src/*.js || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */backend/src/*.ts ]]; then cd backend && npx eslint "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | tail -20; fi'

bash -c '# HARNESS-LINT-HOOK-TS
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */frontend/src/*.js || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */frontend/src/*.jsx || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */frontend/src/*.ts || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */frontend/src/*.tsx ]]; then cd frontend && npx eslint "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | tail -20; elif [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */backend/src/*.js || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */backend/src/*.ts ]]; then cd backend && npx eslint "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | tail -20; fi'

bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */frontend/src/*.test.* || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */frontend/src/*.spec.* ]]; then cd frontend && npx vitest run "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tail -30; elif [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */backend/src/*.test.* || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */backend/src/*.spec.* ]]; then cd backend && npx jest "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --verbose 2>&1 | tail -30; fi'

bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */frontend/src/*.test.* || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */frontend/src/*.spec.* ]]; then cd frontend && npx vitest run "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tail -30; elif [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */backend/src/*.test.* || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */backend/src/*.spec.* ]]; then cd backend && npx jest "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --verbose 2>&1 | tail -30; fi'
